title: T-015 — Seed fifo_strategy_v1 DSL rule
prompt:
# T-015 — Seed fifo_strategy_v1 DSL rule

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §9.1, §9.3.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Seed the rule registry with `fifo_strategy_v1` for non-expiring goods picking — orders by created_at ASC.

## Implementation contract
JSON DSL `packages/db/seed/rules/fifo-strategy-v1.json` (inputs identical to FEFO; outputs sorted by created_at ASC with qa_status gating). Seed script upserts.

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/seed/rules/fifo-strategy-v1.json [create]
- packages/db/seed/rules/fifo-strategy-v1.seed.ts [create]
- packages/db/seed/rules/__tests__/fifo-strategy-v1.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the seed runs, when rule_registry is queried, then fifo_strategy_v1 v1.0 exists with §9.1 input shape.
2. Given two LPs created at 09:00 and 10:00, when the rule executes, then 09:00 LP ranks first.
3. Given an LP with qa_status='FAILED', when the rule executes with defaults, then it is excluded.

## Test strategy
- RED: fifo-strategy-v1.test.ts seeds two LP fixtures and asserts FIFO order + FAILED exclusion.
- Run `pnpm --filter db test fifo-strategy-v1`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not include FAILED/HOLD/QUARANTINED LPs.
- Do not let rule become editable at runtime.
- Do not duplicate FEFO logic — order by created_at only.

pipeline_inputs.details: Order by created_at ASC. qa_status gating defaults to PASSED/RELEASED.
